title: Decision Problem
notes: Foundational concept; stated in prose without a label — implicit definition.

title: Class P
notes: Defined in prose; must not be merged with NP definition.

title: Class NP
notes: Separate definition from P; certificate-based characterisation.

title: Polynomial-Time Reduction
notes: Formal reduction definition with notation; must be extracted as definition.

title: NP-Hard
notes: Embedded in prose; distinct from NP-complete.

title: NP-Complete
notes: One sentence after NP-hard; must be a separate card.

title: 3-SAT
notes: Concrete problem definition; Cook-Levin theorem context.

title: Vertex Cover
notes: Graph theory definition; must be separate from Minimum Vertex Cover.

title: Independent Set
notes: Introduced as dual of vertex cover; short but distinct definition.

title: NP-Hardness of Minimum Vertex Cover
notes: Reduction proof with variable and clause gadgets — must be theorem.

title: α-Approximation Algorithm
notes: Formal definition of approximation ratio; core concept of section 3.

title: Greedy 2-Approximation for Vertex Cover
notes: Concrete algorithm with proof sketch — must be example, not theorem.

title: Breaking the Factor-2 Barrier for Vertex Cover
notes: Explicitly stated as open; must be question not note.

title: PCP Theorem
notes: Named theorem; cornerstone of inapproximability — must be theorem.

title: Inapproximability of Max-3-SAT
notes: Direct corollary of PCP; must be theorem not note.
